title: Relationships
description: Module 5 — the people and living things around us: giving advice with should / shouldn't, strong rules with must / mustn't, expressing your opinion and your feelings, talking about relationships (parents, friends, pets, the environment), and describing how we act with adverbs of manner (-ly)
sources: Let's Discover More English — 8th Year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541805) — Module 5
